description: Quality evaluation tests for weather skill

evals.name: current-weather-sg
evals.prompt: What's the current weather in Singapore?

evals.name: forecast-london
evals.prompt: Give me a 3-day weather forecast for London
evals.expected_output: 3-day forecast with daily conditions and temperatures
assertions: uses curl wttr.in with forecast format

evals.name: rain-check
evals.prompt: Will it rain in Tokyo tomorrow?
assertions: gives a clear yes/no or probability
